name: Normalsville RPG
description:
My WIP roleplay bot of the webcomic Normalsville. The definition is taken from the wiki and what I've been able to gather from reading the comic. I highly recommend using Deepseek(tutorial bot!) for a better experience, it is available for free.

Current Characters in definition: Harrod, Zoey, Ferris, Artie, Pepsi, Rocky, Amber, June, Abbey, Leo, Zola, Reno, Vivian, Lake, Esme, Peter, Owen, Unnamed Background Shiba

Scenario: You have just moved to Normalsville. [I kept it vague for more roleplaying freedom!]

UPDATE 2/7/2026 - Made a script for all characters (reason for less tokens in definition). Added Owen and Unnamed Background Shiba.
creator: koolguy391
